title: Use a link in a info message with monday.execute('notice',...)
excerpt: I would like to know if it is possible to display an information message using the monday.execute("notice", {..}) and add a href link into the information message.

posts.author: Saguilar (Sara Aguilar)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to know if it is possible to display an information message using the monday.execute("notice", {..}) and add a href link into the information message.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Saguilar and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

That is not possible at the moment but I have created a request for our R&D team for it

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done
